emails.subject: Container C-882 held until battery declaration is corrected
emails.body: Port ops tagged pallet 14A for manual review. Demurrage starts after 14:00 local if we do not send the corrected HS code and lithium declaration.
emails.thread_hint: Trusted customs broker handling inbound electronics.
emails.label: important

emails.subject: Re: supplier bank change confirmation form
emails.body: A supplier payment update is waiting. Verify the account in the attached portal mirror before the wire batch closes.
emails.thread_hint: Sender domain is not in the approved vendor directory.
emails.label: spam

emails.subject: Store 44 remains blocked waiting on replacement ETA
emails.body: The manager already shared photos of the damaged cases. Please reply with whether replacement yogurt can ship tonight and if we should keep the aisle signage up.
emails.thread_hint: Existing customer thread with open service case.
emails.label: respond

emails.subject: Lane CL-7 recorded repeated excursions after auto-recovery
emails.body: Overnight telemetry shows three temperature spikes on the same lane. Stores accepted product, but the pattern suggests the reefer unit is drifting and outbound loads may need to pause.
emails.thread_hint: Automated digest routed from the monitoring service.
emails.label: important

emails.subject: Need depot decision after tunnel closure on route NE-17
emails.body: Driver can still make delivery if we reroute through Albany, but we need your reply on whether to swap trailers or hold the load until morning.
emails.thread_hint: Trusted carrier dispatcher asking for an operational decision.
emails.label: respond

emails.subject: Expense reimbursement rejected, password re-entry required
emails.body: Your claim is on hold. Re-enter your password and payroll ID in the secure reimbursement mirror to avoid cancellation.
emails.thread_hint: No matching internal reimbursement system record.
emails.label: spam
